name: drift-flux slip vs canonical slug-flow values
source: PRIMARY (origin of each value): Dumitrescu (1943) vertical Fr=0.35 [confirmed by Nicklin et al. 1962]; Nicklin et al. (1962) C0=1.2; Benjamin (1968) horizontal Fr=0.542 [adopted by Bendiksen 1984]; Bendiksen (1984) horizontal C0~1.05. Secondary compilations (not origins): Shoham (2006), Fabre & Line (1992).
